articles.title: Meta Has a New AI Image Tool, and I Already Used It to Deepfake My Friend's Instagram
articles.description: Instagram users might want to opt out of this AI setting right now.
articles.content: Meta has a new AI model out, this time dedicated to generating and editing AI images. And yes, you can use it on Instagram. But if you have a public account, you need to change your settings now to avoid ending up the unwitting subject of anyone's AI... [3083 chars]

articles.description: As artificial intelligence shapes warfare development around the world, the SAF must enhance relations between man and machine, says defence consultancy managing director Nicholas Fang.

articles.title: Markets live: Oil prices surge after US launches strikes on Iran, ASX to slip after Wall Street's tech sell-off
articles.description: The Australian share market is likely to fall in morning trade after a sell-off across technology and artificial intelligence (AI) stocks knocked Wall Street's tech index sharply lower. Oil prices surged after the US confirmed it launched strikes on Iran, after three commercial ships were attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. Follow live.

articles.title: Nasdaq sinks as AI worries hit chipmakers
articles.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average declined 0.25 per cent to 52,925.15 points. Read more at straitstimes.com.
articles.content:
NEW YORK - The Nasdaq ended sharply lower on July 7, weighed down by losses in Micron Technology and other chipmakers due to mounting doubts about the sustainability of Wall Street’s AI-driven rally.

articles.title: SCHMID Group Secures Repeat Order Exceeding EUR 37 Million for Advanced HDI-ML and mSAP Equipment
articles.description: FREUDENSTADT, Germany, July 07, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- SCHMID Group (NASDAQ: SHMD) has received a repeat order exceeding EUR 37 million from a leading Chinese customer for advanced HDI-ML and mSAP production equipment. The equipment supports the customer’s next capacity expansion for next-generation AI server boards and optical module applications and follows the successful completion of the first phase supplied by SCHMID in 2025.

articles.title: OpenAI’s Chief Futurist Is Leaving the Company
articles.description: Joshua Achiam spent nearly nine years at OpenAI researching AI safety and made a memorable appearance in the Musk v. Altman trial.
articles.content: OpenAI’s chief futurist Joshua Achiam notified colleagues on Tuesday that he is leaving the company later this month after nearly nine years, WIRED has learned. Achiam, who previously led a team tasked with upholding the organization’s nonprofit miss... [6187 chars]
